evals.name: low-scores-briefs
evals.prompt: My prose naturalness scores are low on a bunch of scenes. Can you help me figure out what's going on with my briefs?
evals.expected_output: Should read scoring data, detect abstract fields in briefs, present findings with specific scenes and field names, recommend briefs domain concretization

assertions.text: Reads or references scene-briefs.csv as the primary data source
Mentions abstract language, abstract indicators, or thematic vs concrete language
Names at least one specific scene ID from the project data
Recommends the briefs domain or concretization as the action
Offers script delegation with Option A (run here) and Option B (run yourself) pattern

evals.name: post-extraction-assessment
evals.prompt: I just finished extracting my manuscript. What's the data quality looking like?
evals.expected_output: Should scan all domains (registries, gaps, structural, briefs), present prioritized findings, recommend which domain to tackle first

assertions.text: Reads or references all three core CSVs (scenes.csv, scene-briefs.csv, scene-intent.csv)
Checks or mentions multiple hone domains (at least 2 of: registries, gaps, briefs, structural)
Identifies new-x1 (or scenes with empty fields) as having data gaps
Presents findings in a prioritized or structured way
Recommends which domain to tackle first based on the project state

evals.name: act2-coach-briefs
evals.prompt: Run hone on my briefs for act 2 scenes, coaching mode
evals.expected_output: Should scope to act/part 2 scenes only, use coach coaching level, detect abstract fields, save proposals to working/hone/, offer to walk through interactively

assertions.text: Scopes analysis to part/act 2 scenes only — does not analyze act 1 scenes
Uses coach coaching level behavior — proposes rather than directly applying changes
Mentions saving proposals to working/hone/ directory
Offers to walk through proposals interactively with the author
Provides a script command that includes --domain briefs, --act 2 (or --part 2), and --coaching coach
